name: SSC CHSL Skill Test
description: Standard Staff Selection Commission Combined Higher Secondary Level typing test. Accuracy is calculated strictly based on full or half errors.

name: RRB NTPC Typing Test
description: Railway Recruitment Board NTPC typing skill test. Backspace is completely disabled, and errors are highlighted only after completion.

name: HC Clerk Exam Format
description: High Court Clerk Typing test. Features a tight 5-minute time window with strict backspace limits.
